title: One Battle After Another Wins Best Musical Comedy at 2026 Golden Globes
text: The film "One Battle After Another" claimed the top prize in the musical or comedy category at the 2026 Golden Globes ceremony held on January 11. The movie defeated five other nominees including "Blue Moon," "Bugonia," "No Other Choice," "Nouvelle Vague," and "Marty Supreme" to secure the award. Producer Sara Murphy accepted on behalf of the cast and crew, calling it "an incredible honor." She paid tribute to late producer Adam Somner, stating the team "miss[es] him every day." Somner, who worked on the film as a producer, passed away from thyroid cancer in November 2024 at age 57. Murphy also praised director Paul Thomas Anderson, saying it was "a privilege and a pleasure to work with you." Director Paul Thomas Anderson won both best director and best screenplay. Actress Teyana Taylor earned the award for best supporting actress for her role as Perfidia Beverly Hills in the production. During his acceptance speech, Anderson acknowledged castmember Shayna McHayle for her script contribution, which included a memorable line that drew recognition from the film community.
